items.title_ko: 은 가격은 오일 슬럼프, 부드러운 달러 리프트 XAG/USD로 다주 최고치로 상승

items.title: GBP/USD climbs as US-Iran peace hopes weaken US Dollar
items.summary: GBP/USD advances by some 0.28% on Thursday as the US and Iran appear close to signing a peace deal that could reopen the Strait of Hormuz, while keeping issues like the nuclear program unresolved. At the time of writing,
